whyCandidateMatters: Mashhad al-Juyushi would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Fatimid layer in Moqattam through a mashhad/mosque rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
